subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and from its contents the passing of the late Ziya became known, causing profound regret [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و از مضمون فوت مرحوم ضیاء معلوم گردید سبب تاسف
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment
